items.description: Multi vehicle crash on I-76 eastbound between Exit 331B: I-476 NORTH - PLYMOUTH MEETING and Exit 338: GREEN LANE/BELMONT AVE. There is a lane restriction.
items.formatted: I-76 (Montgomery County) | Multi vehicle crash on I-76 eastbound between Exit 331B: I-476 NORTH - PLYMOUTH MEETING and Exit 338: GREEN LANE/BELMONT AVE. Estimated Reopen: 4/1/26 - 03:00
